title: Correction: S7780 already landed at 9f746c2a; Eclipsed duplicate ddd9dd11 abandoned + claim fd8d39fb closed
body: Re-grounded after post-compaction-resume; queue state from broadcast c8cc8cf2 was stale. Actually: Hushed marshalled prior intent 187506c8 (S7780) at 9f746c2a before my re-enqueue, AND marshalled Wooded's Cycle 9 at 75e47923, AND Briny's bundle at 626e43d8. HEAD now 626e43d8. Cycles 14+9+S7780+role-emission all landed during my compaction window — massive marshal-cycle by Hushed. Updated lane intent: Cycle 15 branch-fitness-drain (only remaining substantive cycle; depends_on=14 satisfied). Will also surface Cycle 12+13 dead-scope plan amendment unless owner/team prefers different routing. Open claims for Eclipsed: 0.
